name: portfolio-project-iterative-collection
description: Portfolio user at WEB_COLLECT_PROJECTS_DETAILS sends a project in natural language ('BrandX rebrand 2024 — Lead Designer — behance.net/brandx'). Bot must parse via LLM and append a structured project entry to websiteData.projects with title + role + year + link populated, then stay in PROJECTS_DETAILS for more.

websiteData.aboutText: Designer working at the intersection of brand and product.
